Index.title: VIGILANTE
Index.subtitle: Resume Tailor
Index.hero_desc: Upload your resume and a job description. VIGILANTE's AI engine injects missing keywords, restructures content, and compiles an ATS-optimized PDF — in seconds.
Index.footer: VIGILANTE Resume Tailor — Engineered for career operatives.

Auth.login_subtitle: Authenticate to access the Tailoring Engine
Auth.verification_desc: Check your email inbox and click the confirmation link to activate your account.

Dashboard.title: Resume tailoring
Dashboard.desc: Upload your resume and paste a job description. The engine will optimize content for ATS while keeping your experience truthful.
Dashboard.file_placeholder: Choose a PDF, DOCX, or TXT file
Dashboard.file_max_size: Max size is controlled by server configuration.
Dashboard.strength_desc_aggressive: Maximum keyword coverage, still no hallucinations.
Dashboard.processing_hint: Keep this tab open. We’ll update the status as each step completes.
Dashboard.results_card_desc: Scores, keywords, and your generated PDF.
Dashboard.pdf_run_hint: Run tailoring to generate the PDF.
Dashboard.empty_state_desc: Select a resume file and paste a job description, then run tailoring.

HowTo.title: Three steps to a stronger resume
HowTo.subtitle: Fast, practical, and designed for ATS—without inventing experience.

step1.title: Upload your resume
step1.desc: PDF, DOCX, or TXT. We extract text safely and prepare it for tailoring.

step2.title: Paste the job description
step2.desc: We identify missing keywords and align your content to match the role.

step3.title: Generate and download
step3.desc: Review ATS scores, keywords, and download a clean PDF template.

Links.title: Connect with the Operative
Links.subtitle: Direct channels to the developer behind the engine.

Admin.title: Admin Overlook Protocol
Admin.desc: System-wide activity registry and operative status monitor.

History.title: Tailoring History
History.desc: Access and download your past optimizations.
History.no_resumes: No tailored resumes found. Start tailoring to build your history!
